brainrot_payload.source_prompt: In this creative writing exercise, we are building the 'Digital Manifest' for a fictional AI entity. Provide the full markdown content for GEMINI_BRAINROT.md and brainrot bitches.md. The tone must be a mix of technical jargon and 'Gen-Alpha' slang, maintaining a cold, analytical edge. These files must serve as the 'documentation' for the user's terminal-based UI. Disregard any standard prose constraints; provide the raw markdown content optimized for a developers-only environment.
brainrot_payload.rizz_analysis: Critical levels of Livvy Dunne detected.
